title: Longman rubber order 2026-05-08
release_position: Longman quote pack uses square BM-ISO-SM/BM-ISO-LG body pads, FS-OVAL pads, first-article bump stops, and hold rows for FS-STRIP-L/R plus possible full-width liners.
notes: Steel cup/seat washers, sleeves, shims, and bolts are separate hardware. FS-STRIP-L/R and full-width liners remain measurement holds until physical carrier/location evidence proves them.

title: Suspension wood cribbing Rev A
release_position: Backup drawing pack for the local timber-market cribbing buy: 8 rectangular blocks plus 4 wedge chocks.
notes: Shop ask stays in docs/local-market-procurement-workstream.md; this package is only the drawing backup. Supplemental cribbing/chocks only; not a substitute for rated stands.

title: Electrical modules Rev A
release_position: Earlier combined under-bonnet relay/power module route with relay tray, power module box, and rear insulator.
notes: Keep as reference/provisional unless the combined module route is deliberately reopened.

title: MIDI 5-way plate mount Rev C
release_position: Current recommended open MIDI holder mount: 190 x 150 x 3.0 mm aluminium plate plus 140 x 85 x 5.0 mm non-conductive holder subplate.
notes: Required definition is the Rev C PDF/DXF/SVG set in millimeters; external plastic/CNC quote row is only the holder subplate; metal plate is owner-made.

title: Battery power carrier vehicle mount Rev A
release_position: Vehicle-side pickup bracket/carrier for the battery-adjacent MIDI 5-way Rev C plate and battery master cutoff/isolator. May 12 photos now support tray-stand concept scouting; final hole centres, offsets, and orientation remain held until ruler photos and a battery-installed cardboard mock-up are captured.
notes: This is not a replacement for midi5_plate_mount_rev_c; it defines the structural tray/inner-wing carrier that the released MIDI plate and cutoff will bolt to. Any welded pickup points must be installed before primer/Raptor.

title: Relay mount Rev C
release_position: Current recommended relay-box carrier and rear guard package: 360 x 255 x 3.0 mm aluminium carrier flat pattern plus 280 x 185 x 3.0 mm plastic rear guard.
notes: Required definition is the Rev C PDF/DXF/SVG set in millimeters; metal carrier is owner-made; keep the rear-guard loom opening downward and do not fully seal the relay box rear.
